'''Glorga''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crimelord, based on [[Hollast VII|Hollast Seven]] in the [[Hollastin system/Legends|Hollastin system]].<ref name="J4" /> At one time he employed the [[Tunroth]], [[Kiran Tatch]], who grew disgusted at the Hutt's behavior. Tatch eventually spat on Glorga. The Hutt demanded that Tatch leave the Hollastin system, although the face that the Tunroth was not killed reflected the amount of clout he had with the organization.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Among Glorga's retinue was his lieutenant [[Lanish Ran]], [[Thom Clessigan]], the [[Esoomian/Legends|Esoomian]] [[Tirsan]], and the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Nakaron]]. During the [[Second Hollastin Insurrection]], several [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] used the opportunity to try and overthrow Glorga. During the firefight, Glorga's [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] bodyguards were killed, along with his [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] band and Tirsan. Nakaron and Ran fought off the assault and saved Gorga's life.<ref name="J4" />

The incident convinced Nakaron that Ran was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agent, and set about trying to convince Glorga of his beliefs. Glorga did not believe Nakaron, and exiled from the Hollastin system. In a rage, Nakaron killed Glorga with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at point blank range.<ref name="J4" />
